onpremise.title: On-premise installations
onpremise.subtitle: For corporate installations on your own server with custom configuration, SLA guarantees and team training.

items.a: DFlowERP is a modular ERP system designed specifically for small and medium businesses. It covers warehouse management, supply chain, manufacturing, POS and data backup in one integrated solution.
Yes. DFlowERP is installed on your own server or private cloud. You control your data — no one else has access to it.
Minimum: Linux server (Ubuntu 22.04+), 4 CPU cores, 8 GB RAM, 50 GB SSD. For production workloads we recommend 8 cores and 16 GB RAM. Windows Server is also supported.
Yes. You can switch from Monthly to Annual at any time — the difference is deducted proportionally. The Lifetime license requires no renewal.
Your data stays entirely with you, on your own infrastructure. The Backup module provides encrypted backups. We do not send any data to external servers.
All paid plans include email technical support with a 24-hour response time. Lifetime and Enterprise plans receive priority support within 4 hours.

items.q: How does the trial period work?
items.a: Enter your email and you'll receive a download link and installation instructions. The trial version is fully functional for 14 days — no credit card required.
A one-time payment of €1,490 that provides lifetime access to all modules and future updates. Ideal for businesses that want predictable costs without monthly subscriptions.

modal.title: Start your free trial
modal.subtitle: 14 days full access. No credit card.
